title: 2025-2026 college guidance brochure-output
content:
MISSION
Webb's mission is to provide a
dynamic learning community that
nurtures and inspires our students
and alumni to
Think boldly, mindfully and
creatively
Act with honor and moral courage
Lead with distinction
Serve with a generous spirit
HEAD OF SCHOOL
Theresa Smith, Ph.D
COLLEGE GUIDANCE OFFICE
Hector Martinez. Dean
Rhemi Abrams-Fuller. Associate Dean
Adriana Flores, Senior College
Guidance Associate
COLLEGE BOARD CODE NUMBERS
The Webb Schools-050600
1175 West Baseline Road
Claremont. California 91711
ph: 909.482.5265
fx: 909.482.5239
www.webb.org

Faculty
Teaching faculty: 63
75% live on campus
Four-year degrees: 100%
90% hold advanced degrees
Student/teacher ratio: 6:1
Administrators also advise and teach

Enrollment
Total enrollment for 2025-26: 402
CLASS OF 2026
The Webb Schools 99
Given the competitive and selective nature of
the school and the small size of each senior class
The Webb Schools does not rank

Humanities Program

Webb's Two Schools
Join Together as
The Webb Schools
After more than 40 years of single-sex education in
grades 9 and 10, The Webb School of California and
The Vivian Webb School have come together as one
unified institution, now known as The Webb Schools.

SAT Median Scores
EBRW: 740
Math: 780
Composite: 1520
